name: Pasta with Szechuan Spiced Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Dry or fresh penne (or fettuccine, or other pasta -- cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse spinach and remove stems.
2. Peel and seed tomatoes.
3. Clean and devein shrimp.
4. Heat olive oil in a skillet.
5. Add garlic and sauté for a few seconds.
6. Add shrimp and chili paste; cook until shrimp turn pink.
7. Arrange hot cooked pasta on serving platter or individual plates.
8. Arrange shrimp over pasta.
9. Melt butter in the pan by adding it bit by bit.
10. Pour equal amounts of spinach-tomato-butter mixture over pasta.
